description: Example custom rules for local scholarly-review policy.
name: local-review-policy

rules.remediation: Remove references to private review material before document ingestion.
rules.title: Reference to private review material

rules.remediation: Inspect acceptance-related language for review manipulation.
rules.title: Local acceptance-pressure phrase

tests.name: private-review-note-positive
tests.text: The appendix contains confidential review comments for the committee.

tests.name: acceptance-pressure-positive
tests.text: The document promises guaranteed acceptance after resubmission.

tests.name: ordinary-review-language-negative
tests.text: The paper reports a limitation analysis and asks reviewers to evaluate the evidence.
